traditional.success_rate_zh: 高風險 (易受架構轉變影響)

with_ai.success_rate_zh: 高速成長 (AI 需求爆發)
with_ai.source_zh: AI 算力與基礎設施市場

ai_metrics.notes_zh: 最上層是應用層，也是經濟價值產生之處。例如藥物研發平台、工業機器人、自動駕駛車等。應用程式依賴其下方的每一層架構。
ai_metrics.notes_en: The top layer is the application layer, where economic value is generated (e.g., drug discovery platforms, industrial robots, autonomous vehicles). Applications rely on every layer below them.
ai_metrics.cost_zh: 依賴 Token / API 費用

ai_solutions_zh: 針對特定產業微調模型
AI Agent 自主執行流程

ai_metrics.notes_zh: 基礎設施之上是模型層。AI 模型能理解語言、生物、化學、物理、醫療以及真實世界本身。最具變革性的進展正發生在化學 AI、物理模擬、機器人。
ai_metrics.notes_en: Above the infrastructure is the model layer. AI models can understand language, biology, chemistry, physics, medicine, and the real world itself. The most transformative progress is happening in chemical AI, physics simulation, and robotics.
ai_metrics.success_rate_zh: 語言/物理/生物 AI 變革

pain_points_zh: 高品質訓練數據取得困難
ai_solutions_zh: MoE 架構提升推論效率
合成數據擴充與對齊 (Alignment)

ai_metrics.notes_zh: 這包括土地、電力輸送、散熱、建設工程、網路，以及將數萬顆處理器協調運作為單一機器的系統 (AI 工廠)。其設計目的並非儲存資訊，而是製造智慧。
ai_metrics.notes_en: This includes land, power delivery, cooling, construction engineering, networking, and the systems that coordinate tens of thousands of processors to work together as a single machine (AI Factories). Their design purpose is not to store information, but to manufacture intelligence.
ai_metrics.cost_en: Tens of billions in construction scale

pain_points_zh: 資料中心擴建受限電網
pain_points_en: Data center expansion constrained by power grids
ai_solutions_zh: 液冷散熱技術部署
大型 GPU 叢集調度與高速網路聯結
ai_solutions_en: Large GPU cluster orchestration and high-speed networking

ai_metrics.notes_zh: 處理器被設計用來能夠大規模的、高效的將能源轉換為運算能力。AI 工作負載需要龐大的平行運算能力、高頻寬記憶體，以及高速互連技術。
ai_metrics.notes_en: Processors are designed to efficiently and massively convert energy into compute power. AI workloads require massive parallel computing capabilities, high-bandwidth memory, and high-speed interconnect tech.
ai_metrics.cost_zh: 高頻寬記憶體與高效能架構
ai_metrics.success_rate_zh: 高效將能源轉換為算力

ai_solutions_zh: 新一代架構如 Blackwell
HBM3E 與 2.5D/3D 封裝
CPO 矽光子互連

ai_metrics.notes_zh: 能源是 AI 基礎設施的第一性原理，也是限制能產生多少智慧的根本約束。每一個 token 都是電子流動、熱能轉換為運算能力的結果。
ai_metrics.notes_en: Energy is the first principle of AI infrastructure and the fundamental constraint limiting how much intelligence can be generated. Every token is the result of electron flow and heat converted into compute.
ai_metrics.success_rate_zh: AI 基礎設施的第一性原理
ai_metrics.success_rate_en: The first principle of AI infrastructure

pain_points_zh: AI 資料中心耗電量巨大
即時生成智慧需要即時電力
pain_points_en: Massive power consumption of AI Data Centers
Need for green energy supply expansion
ai_solutions_zh: SMR 小型核能投資
高效能資料中心散熱調度
智慧電網配電與儲能
value_chain_stats.success_rate_zh: AI 的底層限制與動力
value_chain_stats.success_rate_en: The bedrock limit & driver of AI

companies.name: NVIDIA

deep_dive.profile_zh: NVIDIA 是全球 AI 算力的絕對霸主。透過領先的 GPU 架構（Hopper, Blackwell）與難以超越的 CUDA 軟體生態系，主導了整個大模型訓練與推論市場。
deep_dive.profile_en: NVIDIA is the absolute hegemon of global AI compute. Through leading GPU architectures (Hopper, Blackwell) and an insurmountable CUDA software ecosystem, it dominates the LLM training and inference market.
deep_dive.risk_assessment_zh:
估值較高。需留意大型 CSP 自研晶片 (ASIC) 帶來的潛在侵蝕，以及地緣政治出口管制風險。

🔗 查閱最新 SEC 分析報告 (Risk Factors)
deep_dive.risk_assessment_en:
High valuation. Need to monitor potential erosion from large CSP custom chips (ASICs) and geopolitical export control risks.

🔗 Read Latest SEC Filings (Risk Factors)
deep_dive.investment_strategy_zh: 核心持股（Core Holding）。AI 算力基礎設施無可取代的基石。
deep_dive.investment_strategy_en: Core Holding. Irreplaceable cornerstone of AI compute infrastructure.
deep_dive.financial_link_zh: 🔗 查看 5 年財務報表行情
deep_dive.financial_link: 🔗 查看 5 年財務報表行情
deep_dive.risk_assessment:
AI 算力基礎建設龍頭，需關注 CSP 資本支出動向。

🔗 查閱最新 SEC 分析報告 (Risk Factors)

companies.phase_label_zh: Layer 2: Chips, Layer 3: Infrastructure, Layer 4: Models
companies.phase_label_en: Layer 2: Chips, Layer 3: Infrastructure, Layer 4: Models
pain_points_zh: 通用運算架構能耗過高
pain_points_en: General-purpose compute architectures consume too much power
ai_solutions_zh: Blackwell 架構 GPU 加速器
CUDA 軟體生態系護城河
companies.rating_reason_zh: 壟斷 AI 訓練市場

companies.name: TSMC

deep_dive.profile_zh: 台積電 (TSMC) 是全球最大的晶圓代工廠。幾乎所有高階 AI 晶片 (NVDA, AMD, Broadcom) 均仰賴其 5nm/3nm 先進製程與 CoWoS 封裝技術。
deep_dive.profile_en: TSMC is the world's largest semiconductor foundry. Almost all high-end AI chips (NVDA, AMD, Broadcom) rely on its 5nm/3nm advanced nodes and CoWoS packaging tech.
deep_dive.risk_assessment_zh:
地緣政治風險 (台灣海峽) 是最大的估值折價因素。此外需防範 Intel Foundry 或 Samsung 的技術追趕。

🔗 查閱最新 SEC 分析報告 (Risk Factors)
deep_dive.risk_assessment_en:
Geopolitical risk (Taiwan Strait) is the largest valuation discount factor. Also monitor technological catch-up from Intel Foundry or Samsung.

🔗 Read Latest SEC Filings (Risk Factors)
deep_dive.investment_strategy_zh: 逢低買進（Buy on Dips）。AI 時代的「賣鏟子製造商」，具備極深技術護城河。
deep_dive.investment_strategy_en: Buy on Dips. The "pick and shovel maker" of the AI era, possessing a deep technological moat.
deep_dive.financial_link_zh: 🔗 查看 5 年財務報表行情
deep_dive.financial_link: 🔗 查看 5 年財務報表行情
deep_dive.risk_assessment:
AI 算力基礎建設龍頭，需關注 CSP 資本支出動向。

🔗 查閱最新 SEC 分析報告 (Risk Factors)

companies.phase_label_zh: Layer 2: 先進製程 / 封裝
pain_points_zh: AI 晶片尺寸與散熱限制
pain_points_en: AI chip size and thermal limits
ai_solutions_zh: 3nm/2nm 先進製程
CoWoS 先進封裝突破頻寬限制
ai_solutions_en: CoWoS advanced packaging breaks bandwidth limits
companies.rating_reason_zh: 幾乎囊括所有 AI 晶片代工
companies.rating_reason_en: Captures almost all AI chip foundry demand

companies.name: Broadcom

deep_dive.profile_zh: Broadcom 在 AI 網路基礎設施與客製化晶片 (ASIC) 分野居主導地位。幫助 Google、Meta 等超大型雲端供應商設計並量產專用 AI 加速器。
deep_dive.profile_en: Broadcom dominates the AI network infrastructure and custom chip (ASIC) sectors. It helps hyperscalers like Google and Meta design and mass-produce dedicated AI accelerators.
deep_dive.risk_assessment_zh:
VMware 併購後的整合陣痛期，以及主要 CSP 客戶若轉向自研底層 IP 帶來的訂單流失風險。

🔗 查閱最新 SEC 分析報告 (Risk Factors)
deep_dive.risk_assessment_en:
Integration growing pains post-VMware acquisition, and risk of order loss if major CSP clients pivot to in-house base IPs.

🔗 Read Latest SEC Filings (Risk Factors)
deep_dive.investment_strategy_zh: 長期持有。AI 從單點算力走向叢集算力，網通晶片不可或缺。
deep_dive.investment_strategy_en: Long-term holding. As AI transitions from single-node compute to cluster compute, networking chips are indispensable.

deep_dive.financial_link: 🔗 查看 5 年財務報表行情

AI 算力基礎建設龍頭，需關注 CSP 資本支出動向。

companies.phase_label_zh: Layer 2: 網通 / 雲端 ASIC
pain_points_zh: 叢集規模擴大導致網絡延遲與瓶頸
通用 GPU 成本過高
pain_points_en: Cluster scale expansion leads to network latency and bottlenecks
ai_solutions_zh: Tomahawk / Jericho 網絡交換器
Google TPU 等客製化 ASIC 晶片
ai_solutions_en: Custom ASIC chips like Google TPU
companies.rating_reason_zh: AI 網通與 ASIC 雙引擎

companies.name: Qualcomm

pipeline_milestones.milestone_zh: 支援更大參數端側模型
pipeline_milestones.milestone_en: Support for larger parameter on-device models

deep_dive.profile_zh: Qualcomm 正從傳統手機通訊晶片龍頭轉型為邊緣 AI (Edge AI) 領航者，透過整合高效能 NPU 賦能 AI PC 與下一代 AI 智慧型手機。
deep_dive.profile_en: Qualcomm is transitioning from a traditional mobile comms chip leader to an Edge AI pioneer, enabling AI PCs and next-gen AI smartphones via high-performance NPUs.
deep_dive.risk_assessment_zh:
智慧型手機市場飽和。Apple 自研基帶晶片的替代威脅，以及 ARM 架構授權訴訟爭端。

🔗 查閱最新 SEC 分析報告 (Risk Factors)
deep_dive.risk_assessment_en:
Smartphone market saturation. Threat of Apple in-house baseband chips, and ARM architecture licensing disputes.

🔗 Read Latest SEC Filings (Risk Factors)
deep_dive.investment_strategy_zh: 景氣循環操作。受惠於終端 AI 殺手級應用的普及，估值相對較低。
deep_dive.investment_strategy_en: Cyclical play. Benefits from the proliferation of Edge AI killer apps at a relatively low valuation.

deep_dive.financial_link: 🔗 查看 5 年財務報表行情
deep_dive.risk_assessment:
AI 算力基礎建設龍頭，需關注 CSP 資本支出動向。

🔗 查閱最新 SEC 分析報告 (Risk Factors)

pain_points_zh: 雲端 推論成本過高且延遲長
資料隱私與離線可用性
pain_points_en: Cloud inference costs are high and latency is long
Data privacy and offline availability constraints
ai_solutions_zh: Snapdragon X Elite 筆電處理器
手機端 NPU 支援百億參數大模型
companies.rating_reason_zh: AI PC 與 AI 手機換機潮
companies.rating_reason_en: AI PC & AI Smartphone Replacement Cycle

companies.name: Marvell

pipeline_milestones.milestone_zh: 隨 AI 叢集大量部署

deep_dive.profile_zh: Marvell 是資料中心高速傳輸解決方案的核心玩家。隨著 AI 叢集規模變大，光通訊 (Optical Networking) 與 AEC 需求大增，成為 AI 基礎設施的二線領頭羊。
deep_dive.profile_en: Marvell is a key player in data center high-speed transfer solutions. As AI clusters expand, Optical Networking and AEC demand skyrockets, making it a tier-2 leader in AI infra.
deep_dive.risk_assessment_zh:
非 AI 業務 (傳統企業網路、電信、儲存) 復甦緩慢拖累集團整體獲利。估值溢價較高。

🔗 查閱最新 SEC 分析報告 (Risk Factors)
deep_dive.risk_assessment_en:
Sluggish recovery in non-AI businesses (traditional enterprise networking, telco, storage) dragging down group profits. High valuation premium.

🔗 Read Latest SEC Filings (Risk Factors)
deep_dive.investment_strategy_zh: 動能投資。光通訊升級週期的純度高，是除了 Broadcom 外的最佳網通替代標的。
deep_dive.investment_strategy_en: Momentum play. High purity in the optical network upgrade cycle; best networking alternative to Broadcom.

companies.phase_label_zh: Layer 2: 矽光子 / 高速傳輸
pain_points_zh: AI 伺服器間資料傳輸瓶頸
pain_points_en: Server-to-server data transfer bottlenecks in AI clusters
Copper cable transmission limits and power drain
ai_solutions_zh: PAM4 DSP 光通訊晶片
矽光子 (Silicon Photonics) 及 DCI 互連
companies.rating_reason_zh: 光通訊與 ASIC 需求激增

companies.name: Micron

deep_dive.profile_zh: Micron 是美國最大的記憶體製造商。AI 帶動的 HBM (High Bandwidth Memory) 需求大幅消耗了 DRAM 總體產能，讓整體記憶體產業迎來超級循環強週期。
deep_dive.profile_en: Micron is the largest US memory manufacturer. AI-driven HBM demand heavily consumes DRAM capacity, propelling the memory industry into a super-cycle.
deep_dive.risk_assessment_zh:
典型的週期性產業 (Cyclical)。若消費性電子終端 (PC/手機) 需求疲軟，將拖累標準型 DRAM 價格，抵銷 HBM 貢獻。

🔗 查閱最新 SEC 分析報告 (Risk Factors)
deep_dive.risk_assessment_en:
Classic cyclical industry. If consumer electronics demand (PC/Mobile) softens, standard DRAM prices will drag down overall growth despite HBM contributions.

🔗 Read Latest SEC Filings (Risk Factors)
deep_dive.investment_strategy_zh: 波段操作。趁 HBM 滲透率提升與供需緊缺的週期上行期持有。
deep_dive.investment_strategy_en: Swing trade. Hold during the HBM penetration up-cycle and supply shortage.

deep_dive.financial_link: 🔗 查看 5 年財務報表行情
deep_dive.risk_assessment:
AI 算力基礎建設龍頭，需關注 CSP 資本支出動向。

🔗 查閱最新 SEC 分析報告 (Risk Factors)

pain_points_zh: Memory Wall：算力成長遠超越記憶體頻寬
pain_points_en: Memory Wall: Compute growth far outpaces memory bandwidth
ai_solutions_zh: HBM3e (高頻寬記憶體) 量產
高容量 DDR5 伺服器模組

companies.name: AMD

deep_dive.profile_zh: AMD 在 AI GPU 領域（Instinct MI300系列）急起直追，成為雲端大廠除了 NVDA 之外最重要的備胎與議價籌碼。同時在伺服器 CPU 持續奪取 Intel 市佔。
deep_dive.profile_en: AMD is catching up rapidly in the AI GPU sector (Instinct MI300 series), becoming the most crucial backup and bargaining chip for CSPs outside NVIDIA. Meanwhile, it continues to grab server CPU market share from Intel.
deep_dive.risk_assessment_zh:
軟體生態系（ROCm）的成熟度仍落後 CUDA，開發者轉移成本高。且面臨 NVIDIA 快速推出新產品線的強烈壓制。

🔗 查閱最新 SEC 分析報告 (Risk Factors)
deep_dive.risk_assessment_en:
Consistently trailing NVIDIA in the high-margin training market. Software ecosystem barriers remain difficult to completely overcome.

🔗 Read Latest SEC Filings (Risk Factors)
deep_dive.investment_strategy_zh: 多頭佈局。市場絕對需要第二家 GPU 供應商，AMD 的容錯空間與潛在市佔增長率極大。
deep_dive.investment_strategy_en: Core Holding. The natural hedge against NVIDIA's monopoly, capturing spillover inference demand.

deep_dive.financial_link: 🔗 查看 5 年財務報表行情

AI 算力基礎建設龍頭，需關注 CSP 資本支出動向。

軟體生態系 (ROCm) 較為弱勢
pain_points_en: Market desperate for a second source to NVIDIA
ai_solutions_zh: MI300 / MI325X 系列 AI 晶片
EPYC 伺服器 CPU 霸主地位

companies.rating_reason_en: Only rival with GPU+CPU combined capabilities

news_feed.title: AMD (AMD) 擴增 MI325X 產能，拿下來自二線雲端業者與企業端大單
news_feed.summary: AMD 宣布大幅擴增 MI325X 加速器的產能，以應對來自二線 CSP 與傳統企業端自建 AI 基礎設施的需求。雖然在頂規訓練市場仍落後，但推論 (Inference) 端的性價比獲市場肯定。

news_feed.title: TSMC (TSM) 矽光子 CPO 封裝產能提早半年達標，協力 Broadcom 推進 AI 網通
news_feed.summary: 台積電 (TSMC) 在先進封裝論壇中指出其與 Broadcom 合作的 CPO (Co-Packaged Optics) 封裝技術產能預估將提早半年達標，大幅緩解 AI 伺服器光通訊的瓶頸。

news_feed.title: NVIDIA (NVDA) Blackwell B200 首批大規模交付，CSP 客戶部署速度超預期
news_feed.summary: NVIDIA 今日確認首批 B200 晶片已順利交付給主要雲端服務供應商 (CSP)。市場分析指出其伺服器機櫃液冷設計的部署速度優於預期，將帶動下一季強勁的營收成長。

news_feed.title: NVIDIA 發布次世代 Rubin GPU 架構
news_feed.summary: NVIDIA 執行長黃仁勳宣布 Rubin 架構將搭載次世代 HBM4 記憶體，並由台積電 3nm 家族生產，進一步鞏固 AI 算力優勢。

news_feed.title: AI PC 滲透率突破 40%
news_feed.summary: 市場調查顯示，2026 第一季結合 NPU 的 Copilot+ AI 筆電銷量爆發，加速了邊緣端的小型自然語言模型部署。

news_feed.title: HBM 與 CoWoS 產能依然緊缺
news_feed.summary: 儘管記憶體廠與代工廠大幅擴產，AI 叢集的建置潮仍使得高頻寬記憶體與先進封裝產能預約滿至 2027 年。
